description_long: This is a modern, low-floor city bus with a predominantly white and gray exterior, accented by red and black striping along the lower panels. The bus features large, rectangular tinted windows evenly spaced along both sides, providing ample visibility for passengers. The front of the bus has a wide windshield, side mirrors, and a destination sign area above the windshield, though no route number is displayed. The side panel displays 'Disney Transport' branding in black and red text, indicating its use for shuttle or public transport services. The bus has two visible passenger doors on the right side, one at the front and one in the middle, both with clear glass panels. The wheels are black with detailed hubcaps, and the roof is flat with a raised central section, likely for air conditioning or ventilation units.
description: A modern, low-floor city bus with 'Disney Transport' branding, large tinted windows, and red, black, and white color accents. It features two passenger doors and detailed wheels, designed for urban public transport.
description_view_0: Side view showing the 'Disney Transport' branding, two large passenger doors, and a full row of rectangular windows.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the wide windshield, side mirrors, and the area for a destination sign above the windshield.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with similar window arrangement but no visible doors or branding, highlighting the bus's symmetry.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back window, taillights, and a small display panel, with no visible doors.
attribute_window_arrangement: Seven large, rectangular, evenly spaced passenger windows along each side, separated by vertical pillars, with a consistent height and width; windows are tinted and flush with the bus body.
attribute_bus_manufacturer_logo: The side panel displays 'Disney Transport' branding in black and red text, located centrally between the doors; no manufacturer logo is visible.
